mapper.sql: select r.request_id, r.user_id, r.subject_id, r.grade_id, r.area_id, r.budget_min, r.budget_max, r.contact_info, r.demand_desc, r.teach_mode, r.preferred_time, r.status, r.created_at, u.usersname as parent_name, s.name as subject_name, g.name as grade_name, a.name as area_name from tutor_request r left join users u on u.users_id = r.user_id left join subject s on s.subject_id = r.subject_id left join grade_level g on g.grade_id = r.grade_id left join area_jinan a on a.area_id = r.area_id
mapper.insert: insert into tutor_request (user_id, subject_id, grade_id, area_id, budget_min, budget_max, contact_info, demand_desc, teach_mode, preferred_time, status, created_at) values (#{userId}, #{subjectId}, #{gradeId}, #{areaId}, #{budgetMin}, #{budgetMax}, #{contactInfo}, #{demandDesc}, #{teachMode}, #{preferredTime}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
insert into tutor_request_bid (request_id, teacher_id, message, expected_rate, status, created_at) values (#{requestId}, #{teacherId}, #{message}, #{expectedRate}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
mapper.select: select b.bid_id, b.request_id, b.teacher_id, b.message, b.expected_rate, b.status, b.created_at, t.real_name as teacher_name, t.image as teacher_image, t.education as teacher_education, t.university as teacher_university, r.user_id as request_user_id from tutor_request_bid b left join teacher t on t.teacher_id = b.teacher_id left join tutor_request r on r.request_id = b.request_id where b.bid_id = #{bidId} limit 1

select b.bid_id, b.request_id, b.teacher_id, b.message, b.expected_rate, b.status, b.created_at, t.real_name as teacher_name, t.image as teacher_image, t.education as teacher_education, t.university as teacher_university, r.user_id as request_user_id from tutor_request_bid b left join teacher t on t.teacher_id = b.teacher_id left join tutor_request r on r.request_id = b.request_id where b.request_id = #{requestId} order by case when b.status = 0 then 2 when b.status = 1 then 1 else 0 end desc, b.created_at desc, b.bid_id desc

select b.bid_id, b.request_id, b.teacher_id, b.message, b.expected_rate, b.status, b.created_at, t.real_name as teacher_name, t.image as teacher_image, t.education as teacher_education, t.university as teacher_university, r.user_id as request_user_id from tutor_request_bid b left join teacher t on t.teacher_id = b.teacher_id left join tutor_request r on r.request_id = b.request_id where b.teacher_id = #{teacherId} order by b.created_at desc, b.bid_id desc
